touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Liam Chen at CobaltPortal. No answer, left voicemail introducing our pipeline visibility solution.
LinkedIn message sent to Liam Chen highlighting how we help healthcare IT companies improve forecast accuracy. No response received.
Second cold call attempt to Liam Chen. No answer, left brief follow-up voicemail referencing LinkedIn message.
Third cold call attempt to Liam Chen. No answer, no voicemail left this time.

Qualification call with Liam Chen. He expressed interest in pipeline visibility tools after recent forecasting misses. Currently evaluating Clari but open to alternatives. Discussed team size (8 sales reps) and automation needs.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your search for a pipeline visibility solution right now?
questions_asked.answer: We've had two quarters in a row where we missed our forecast by 20%+. Leadership is pushing us to get better visibility into what's actually going to close.

questions_asked.question: How does your automation compare to Clari's workflow features?
questions_asked.answer: We offer unlimited automation across all plans, whereas Clari gates advanced workflows behind enterprise pricing. For a team your size, that could mean significant cost savings.

next_steps: Liam to check calendar for discovery call next week
Rep to send overview deck on automation capabilities

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message exchange with Liam Chen. He confirmed interest in scheduling a deeper discovery call and asked for pricing ballpark for 8 seats.

questions_asked.question: What's the ballpark pricing for 8 seats with unlimited automation?
questions_asked.answer: For your use case, we're typically in the $8-10K range annually, but let's discuss your specific needs on our call to get you an accurate quote.

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Liam Chen. Discussed current process using spreadsheets and Salesforce reports. Pain points include manual data entry, lack of real-time updates, and difficulty getting reps to update opportunities. Liam is main decision-maker but mentioned needing to present to VP of Sales eventually.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current forecasting process.
questions_asked.answer: Every Monday, reps update Salesforce, then I pull reports and build a spreadsheet. By Thursday it's already outdated. It's completely manual and time-consuming.

questions_asked.question: Who else will be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Ultimately our VP of Sales will need to sign off, but she's given me latitude to find the right tool and bring her a recommendation.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can we get this implemented? We need something in place before end of quarter.
questions_asked.answer: Our typical implementation for a team your size is 2-3 weeks. We can definitely hit your timeline.

next_steps: Rep to send customer case study from similar-sized healthcare company

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Liam confirming demo scheduled for tomorrow. Attached case study showing 40% improvement in forecast accuracy for similar healthcare IT company. Liam responded asking if we can include rep adoption metrics in the demo.

questions_asked.question: Can you show how you track rep adoption and engagement during the demo?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely - we'll walk through our activity tracking and compliance dashboards that show which reps are keeping their pipeline current.

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Liam Chen. Walked through pipeline visibility dashboards, automation workflows, and Salesforce integration. Liam particularly interested in AI-powered deal scoring and automated forecast roll-ups. Asked detailed questions about Clari comparison and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: How does your deal scoring algorithm compare to Clari's approach?
questions_asked.answer: We use a combination of historical close patterns and real-time activity signals, similar to Clari, but our model adapts faster to your specific sales motion since it's trained on your data within the first month.

questions_asked.question: What did you think of the automation capabilities we showed?
questions_asked.answer: Really impressive. The automated Slack alerts and forecast roll-ups would save me hours every week. I like that we can customize the workflows without professional services.

objections: Concerned about getting reps to adopt another tool on top of Salesforce
next_steps: Liam to set up meeting with VP of Sales for next steps conversation
Rep to send pricing proposal for 8 seats with unlimited automation

touches.ai_summary: First executive meeting with Liam Chen. VP of Sales did not attend - Liam mentioned she had a conflict. Discussed proposal ($8,300 ACV for 8 seats), implementation plan, and success metrics. Liam seems enthusiastic but noted he needs to get VP buy-in before moving forward.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything preventing you from moving forward this quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to get on my VP's calendar to walk her through this. She's been swamped but I think she'll be supportive given our forecast accuracy issues.

questions_asked.question: What happens if we don't hit the forecasted adoption metrics?
questions_asked.answer: We include quarterly business reviews and will work with you to optimize adoption. We've never had a customer not see improvement if we're meeting regularly.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to what you've seen from Clari?
questions_asked.answer: Honestly, Clari's pricing was about 60% higher for similar functionality. The unlimited automation at this price point is compelling. I just need to make sure my VP agrees.

next_steps: Liam to schedule meeting with VP of Sales by end of week
Rep to send ROI calculator based on time savings

touches.ai_summary: Second executive meeting with Liam Chen. VP of Sales again did not attend - Liam said she's traveling and will review materials async. Discussed contract terms and onboarding timeline. Liam asked about discounting options given budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on the $8,300 price if we commit to a longer term?
questions_asked.answer: We can explore a small discount for a two-year commitment, but our pricing is already competitive especially with unlimited automation included.

questions_asked.question: When do you think your VP will be able to review everything?
questions_asked.answer: She's back next week. I'm confident she'll approve - she's been on me about fixing our forecasting process.

objections: Budget is tight this quarter, looking for any pricing flexibility
next_steps: Liam to get VP feedback by middle of next week
Rep to prepare pricing options with multi-year scenarios

touches.ai_summary: Third executive meeting with Liam Chen. Still no VP involvement. Discussed revised pricing options including 15% discount for two-year commitment. Liam also brought up that Clari has re-engaged with a competitive offer. Conversation focused on differentiators and implementation speed.

questions_asked.question: Clari came back with a discounted offer - can you match their pricing?
questions_asked.answer: What price did they quote? Our value proposition is different given the unlimited automation, but let's discuss what makes sense for your specific needs.

questions_asked.question: Have you been able to connect with your VP about moving forward?
questions_asked.answer: Not yet - she's been in back-to-back board meetings. I'm hoping to catch her this week.

questions_asked.question: If we sign this week, when could we go live?
questions_asked.answer: We could start implementation immediately and have you live within three weeks, definitely before your next quarter starts.

objections: Clari's counter-offer is making this a closer decision than expected
next_steps: Liam to get definitive answer from VP by Friday
Rep to send final pricing comparison vs Clari with feature breakdown

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call with Liam Chen. Discussed final terms: $7,055 ACV (15% discount) for two-year commitment. Liam still hasn't connected with VP but seems ready to move forward pending her approval. Agreed to send contract for review.

questions_asked.question: Can you send the contract over today so I can queue it up for signatures?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll get that over within the hour with the two-year terms at $7,055 annually.

next_steps: Rep to send contract with two-year terms
Liam to get VP signature and return by end of week
